svg.title: Attack surface pipeline with standalone scope recon
svg.desc: Scope recon is a separate standalone tool above the pipeline. A human validation gate separates it from the main pipeline which runs phases 1 through 5.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the standalone scope recon agent work?')
g.text: Domains, IPs, CIDRs, ASNs — writes scope.json

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the human validation step involve?')
sendPrompt('What does the service discovery phase do?')
sendPrompt('What does the web and API surface agent look for?')
sendPrompt('What does the network services surface agent look for?')
sendPrompt('What does the cloud and infra surface agent look for?')
sendPrompt('What does the supply chain surface agent look for?')
sendPrompt('What does the misconfiguration hunter look for?')
sendPrompt('What does the known CVE hunter look for?')
sendPrompt('How does the verification agent work?')
sendPrompt('How does the coverage tracker decide what to re-run?')

g.text: Surface map · confirmed findings · coverage · PoC refs

svg.text: State: scope.json (pre-validated) · services.json · surface.json · findings.json · coverage.json
